intentSynonyms: show me my restaurants in doordash
see all my restaurants in doordash
show me restaurants on doordash in doordash
description: List or search DoorDash restaurants available for delivery to an address. Optionally filter by a search term (cuisine or restaurant name).

address.description: Delivery address to find restaurants for

query.description: Search term (cuisine, dish, or restaurant name)

limit.description: Maximum number of restaurants to return
